{{Quote|Chewie, short of setting my blaster on stun and shooting them all, there ain't no way of stoppin' them.|Han Solo describes "pilgrims" joining the t'landa Til, as many Aefans did|<ref name="Rebel Dawn">''[[Rebel Dawn]]''</ref>}}
The '''Aefans''' were a [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Species/Legends|species]] of small, [[Color/Legends|orange]]-skinned, [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoids]] who were native to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Aefao]], in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. Their [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] was [[Third Battle of Aefao|contested]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], and later during the [[Imperial Era/Legends|Imperial Era]], the Aefan's homeworld was visited by several [[t'landa Til]], vassals of the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] [[Besadii/Legends|Besadii]] crime family. Many Aefans were exposed to the t'landa Til's [[Exultation]], a biological phenomenon that induced rapturous feeling; consequently, over a hundred Aefans followed the t'landa Til to their colony on the planet [[Ylesia/Legends|Ylesia]]. Visiting [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]], [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], managed to convince several Aefans not to follow the offworlders.

==Biology and appearance==
The Aefans were a [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Species/Legends|species]]. They were [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoid]] in form<ref name="Rebel Dawn" />—having two [[Limb/Legends|arms]] and two legs<ref name="Encounter">''[[Alien Encounters]]''</ref>—and were considered small in size by the [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]]. The Aefans had [[Color/Legends|orange]] skin and were physically susceptible to the [[Exultation]],<ref name="Rebel Dawn" /> in which members of the [[t'landa Til]] species used their physiology to create a resonance frequency that stimulated the [[Brain/Legends|brain's]] pleasure centers.<ref name="Ex">{{CSWECite|I|246|Exultation}}</ref> The Aefans could hear and understand [[Language/Legends|language]].<ref name="Rebel Dawn" />

==History==
The Aefans were native to [[Aefao]], a remote [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="Rebel Dawn" /> located in the [[Corosi sector/Legends|Corosi sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].<ref name="EAOC">{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}}</ref> The region of [[Realspace/Legends|space]] surrounding their [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] was explored by the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] between [[3000 BBY]] to [[1000 BBY/Legends|1000 BBY]].<ref name="Atlas ">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref>

[[File:Exultation-ERC.jpg|thumb|left|An Exultation ceremony, pictured, duped many Aefans into traveling to Ylesia.]]
During the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] of [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]] to [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]], Aefao remained within Republic territory,<ref name="Atlas " /> although it was the site of several battles against the Republic's enemy, the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]]. The Republic battled Separatist forces commanded by [[Major/Legends|Major]] [[Hoom Garaf]] in the [[Third Battle of Aefao]]. The battle was won by the Republic after the [[Chevin/Legends|Chevin]] [[Commander/Legends|commander]] was [[Death/Legends|executed]] by his [[T-series tactical droid/Legends|tactical droid]], sparking chaos in the Separatist's rear guard.<ref name="Warfare">''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]''</ref>

Once, prior to [[2 BBY/Legends|2 BBY]], Aefan was visited by members of the [[t'landa Til]] species, aligned with the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] [[Besadii/Legends|Besadii]] crime family. The t'landa Til performed the Exultation, stimulating the brains of many Aefans. Over a hundred Aefans, still enraptured by the sensation, chose to accompany the t'landa Til to the planet [[Ylesia/Legends|Ylesia]] as "pilgrims"<ref name="Rebel Dawn" /> for the [[Cult of The One and The All]], an ostensible religious organization.<ref name="Snare">''[[The Paradise Snare]]''</ref> In actuality, the pilgrims were used by the t'landa Til to process the addictive [[Spice/Legends|spice]] [[Glitterstim/Legends|glitterstim]], which was later sold to profit the kajidic.<ref name="Ylesia">{{CSWECite|III|355|Ylesia}}</ref> Han Solo, a Human [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] formerly linked with the Ylesian operation, was present on Aefao at the [[Time/Legends|time]] and managed to persuade a few of the Aefans not to travel with the t'landa Til.<ref name="Rebel Dawn" />

Under the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], the Aefans' homeworld was part of [[Oversector Outer]], and it remained part of various Imperial polities until at least [[17 ABY/Legends|17 ABY]].<ref name="Atlas " />

==Behind the scenes==
[[A. C. Crispin]] created the Aefans for her novel ''[[Rebel Dawn]]'', published by [[Bantam Spectra]] in [[1998]]. The species later received an entry in ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'', published in [[2008]], and their homeworld was mentioned in ''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]'', published in [[2012]].
